t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Snapshot date for which gains were calculated. PK component (NOT ENFORCED). Used as DELETE+INSERT key.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Snapshot date for which gains were calculated. PK component (NOT ENFORCED). Used as DELETE+INSERT key. In BI_DB_PastYearsGain, filtered to Jan 1 dates via V_Dim_Date WHERE DayNumberOfYear=1; historical rows (2007–2020) use Dec 1 instead. Part of logical PK (Date, CID).
t1_fidelity_table.loss: Upstream core text preserved verbatim; additional local context appended after it

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Customer ID. FK to Dim_Customer.RealCID. One row per customer per day. PK component (NOT ENFORCED). HASH distribution key.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Customer ID — platform-internal primary key. Assigned at registration. Unique within etoro DB. Used as the universal customer identifier across all tables. Part of logical PK (Date, CID).
t1_fidelity_table.loss: Completely wrong source quoted. Writer used Dim_Customer.RealCID description instead of DWH_GainDaily.CID description. Lost: FK reference to Dim_Customer.RealCID, one-row-per-day semantics, PK component, HASH distribution key.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Trailing 365-day (yearly) compound portfolio return as a decimal. 0.05 = 5% gain. NULL if insufficient trading history. IntervalTypeID=110 from TradeGain service.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Trailing 365-day (yearly) compound portfolio return as a decimal. 0.05 = 5% gain. NULL if insufficient trading history. IntervalTypeID=110 from TradeGain service. Passthrough from DWH_GainDaily.

issues.problem: Tagged Tier 1 — Customer.CustomerStatic but immediate upstream is DWH_GainDaily. SP section 3.4 does SELECT CID FROM DWH_GainDaily. Writer skipped the direct source and traced to a distant root origin, quoting Dim_Customer wiki text instead of DWH_GainDaily wiki text.

CID description ('platform-internal primary key. Assigned at registration. Unique within etoro DB.') is verbatim from Dim_Customer.RealCID wiki, not from DWH_GainDaily.CID wiki ('Customer ID. FK to Dim_Customer.RealCID. One row per customer per day. PK component (NOT ENFORCED). HASH distribution key.'). Complete fidelity failure.
Internal inconsistency: lineage file correctly lists CID source as BI_DB_dbo.DWH_GainDaily with Tier 1, but Elements table says (Tier 1 — Customer.CustomerStatic). These must agree.
Claim 'No Date=2021-01-01 row exists' about the Year1=2020 transition gap is stated as fact without P2 sample evidence. Should be in review-needed if unverified.
Date description appends BI_DB_PastYearsGain-specific filtering context beyond the DWH_GainDaily upstream quote. While upstream core is preserved, the extension blurs the Tier 1 verbatim boundary.

verdict.regeneration_feedback: Re-run with: (1) Re-tag CID as (Tier 1 — DWH_GainDaily) using verbatim text from DWH_GainDaily wiki: 'Customer ID. FK to Dim_Customer.RealCID. One row per customer per day. PK component (NOT ENFORCED). HASH distribution key.' (2) Resolve lineage-vs-elements inconsistency — both must cite DWH_GainDaily as CID source. (3) For Date, lead with upstream quote verbatim then add local context after a separator. (4) Move Year1=2020 gap claim to review-needed unless backed by P2 data.
